h41c52f35g12feg4a46g8451g095676a4ed92: We're heading out. Good luck with your 'kin'.
hbd51913fg8b03g403dgb000ga9f01c58cff1: We're packing up and I'd advise you do the same. Seems our kind ain't welcome here.
h5916a9c6g29c3g492bgb1b3ga4c99874cb6e: We're packing up - I'd advise you to do the same. Seems our kind ain't welcome here.
h734b96dege9b3g4365g84cbg89fb52b41295: Once we're patched up, we're gone.
h00d7bad5g676bg4cc6g887fg8ffabdfff0a9: Weren't no profit in saving Liam - you'd make a crap sellsword. But... thanks.
h3dfdc983gacd1g487egb04cg9a4b01b97e1c: You're all right, for a tiefling. At least you fight.
h66603e40g2fe4g41c4g8717gd97755bfb6f5: We're packing up and I'd advise you do the same. Seems our kind ain't welcome here.
h16fb1bf3g364dg48d5g9b15gbe9d83e8d572: Think you disappointed this lot, swooping in to save us like that. Careful - might turn on you just as quick.
hc5ba174agf459g4325gad3ag82d5d7b5ca0c: Ah, the fighting foulblood. Glad to know one of you has a spine.
h85bb10bfgb087g4e4fga3efg9b10e0a830db: As close as you're gonna get from me today, friend.
h687154c9g6582g47abgb098gfedc37c60f40: Damn sight better than what Zevlor's got coming, after leaving us to die like that.
h823b9e64g5bddg498ag9297g32694ca17f7d: I already regret saving your life.
h4b6a24efgee45g412bg9b50g7bbfcc44568b: Ah - bruised your feelings, did I? Excuse me if I don't weep - got problems of my own.
hbbfd9366g6bc7g48ddgb885gcdc4dacbe9f1: My arm's near hanging off after wise Zevlor left us to die at the gate.
h6e3cf2f0gf383g4dd3ga291g0e1053a2c589: And then he has the bloody gall to try and blame it all on us.
he48cff63g3ac7g4dc6g910dg0aab73e26b28: I'd have done the same in your place.
h8fb03ad8gf549g4ae2g918fg492dc7d977bb: Well. Finally - someone with some sense between their horns.
hb4172b00g8b2cg48cfg875cg0341ce597fa4: Well. Finally - someone who ain't got horns where their good sense should be.
hc17b6ceag91d1g4aeega41cg69baa7f83fb4: We expected a soft job. Something to test the new lad, maybe, but not a bloody goblin nest.
hc1eb33d1g78ddg497fg9e61g23feceb117c9: Most would've turned tail at the sight. But not Liam, no - he charged them, the stupid bastard.
hd5121f5bg18fdg476fg8a8egc1bda6f7c485: I'm guessing that didn't end well.
h534c5a6fg50bcg4af3g9f27g6765fefc6032: Nah. He... must've thought we were following. Always the optimist, was Liam.
hdedd3a0egd649g45b9g85b7g4e4b68ae2a33: Hope they cut him down quick before he saw we were gone.
hc5bff558g34fbg47b7gaa1eg55970cb0a305: So you just left your friend to the goblins?
hbd40e0beg887fg485fgab7cgce711639b065: These weren't no normal goblins. And Liam weren't no friend, all right?
h7fde2451ga405g433ag8471gac579012f1cc: Just another raw recruit thought he was in some storybook.
hbc1f2a4bg55bcg4fbag838egdb4e54d04d59: He died with bravery. You should be proud.
h345d44f7gd8eag4177gabf1gfd30c12c4360: Bravery? No. When it gets you killed, it's just called stupidity.
ha07cbb2dgc540g4111g8cc6g581325a355e9: That was lesson one, if Liam had only bloody listened.
h045dc84fg6fe7g45ffga2e1g7db36329480f: A good death. He earned his place in Warrior's Rest.
h5693d4cfg660cg4475gb1ffge96dd74b942d: Warrior, my arse - not even Tempus himself could teach Liam to swing straight.
h059b5180ge7c5g4aafg9807gdf48cfaab1dc: But aye, maybe you could... say a prayer, or something? Just... put in a good word, like.
h5fa9141ag8a5bg4e97g8265g29a999fa6c4b: He let you in, didn't he? It could have been worse.
h736af85bgb07bg4526g8025g33964d941e99: You put your own people first. That's just the way it is.
h2631143bg0be4g46ceg9e68ga1f6d45117f7: You are to blame - you put his people in danger.
h9c04764ag22f9g4596g8bf2g4100a96e1628: And what about our people? Half the crew's lying dead back in that ruin.
h8f0c8637gdf7cg499cg89f7g61a781c0455d: Even the new lad - his first contract, and we land him in a godsdamned goblin nest.
h16fdca4eg78b7g404egae3dgc3d8e060d3e2: He actually stood and fought, the stupid bastard. Like I never trained him better.
h3d6059f3g4019g40f6gaf02g76612ab33080: You should get that arm seen to.
h9a0c68b3ge335g4c32g8316g67a56e046748: Oh aye? I was just going to let it fall off, stick it in my satchel.
h32459fe3g6091g470ag878dgcca05dd54274: Ain't letting anyone here near me. They all sat and watched while Zevlor near got us killed.
hea32a4d5g1d86g4f94g8bd0gb9e4dcd11d2d: Wait for her to finish cleaning the wound.
hbb181950gbb1cg4b0bgab7bgf2e27cc0bbbc: Like the sight of blood, do you? Thought you'd've had your fill at the gate.
h4b53ac3dg2645g4316g9cf0g09669b429b27: Might be more blood spilled yet, if Zevlor starts in on the lectures again.
h4a2836bcg571bg45efg994fg3a3f0933e805: You should probably get that looked at.
